title: BusinessVerticalSchema
description: Schema specifying the business vertical dual-tagging metadata for tasks and skills.

domain.description: Technical domain (e.g., regex, json, smtp, math, datetime, string_parsing, file_io, algorithms, data_structures, error_handling, testing, generic).

vertical.description: Business vertical (sales, marketing, finance, or generic). Configurable via config.yaml verticals.allowed list.

examples.description: A sales aggregation helper that sums up product revenues
